Preference.android:title: Rate App
Preference.android:summary: Thanks! I appreciate feedback and feature requests

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Makes full screen mode larger by occupying the space around camera notches
SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable Full Screen Notch Mode

ListPreference.android:summary: Set the orientation to landscape, portrait, etc

Preference.android:title: Unlock Full Version
Preference.android:summary: Purchase the full version of the app to play without a trial period

Preference.android:title: Restore Purchase
Preference.android:summary: Restore a purchase you already made. Must login for cross restore to work

Preference.android:title: Clear Cache
Preference.android:summary: Deletes all cached data including saved controllers

Preference.android:title: Forget Saved Console
Preference.android:summary: Forget your saved console so that a prompt will appear the next time you login asking you to select a new default console.

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable this if you don't have GamePass and don't want to wait for the login page to check for a GamePass subscription. This will speedup login by 50% but will disable the xCloud feature.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Skip xCloud Check

Preference.android:title: Email for Help
Preference.android:summary: Click here to send an email to the developer for help.

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable to capture login debug logs. They will be attached when sending a help email (above).
SwitchPreference.android:title: Capture Login Debug Logs

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable to capture gameplay debug logs. They will be attached when sending a help email (above).
SwitchPreference.android:title: Capture Gameplay Debug Logs

ListPreference.android:summary: Change the render engine if you are having video play issues. Fixes: Stuck on black/white screen, video won't update unless the screen is touched, excess lag, etc.
ListPreference.android:title: Render Engine

Preference.android:title: Join Reddit for Help
Preference.android:summary: Click here to open the subreddit where you can ask for help, report bugs, or request features!

Preference.android:title: Join Discord Server for Help
Preference.android:summary: Click here to join a discord server where you can ask for help, report bugs, or request features. This is the quickest way to get in contact with the app developer!

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable vibration for button clicks on the on-screen gamepad
SwitchPreference.android:title: On-Screen Gamepad Vibration

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Rumble your device if there isn't a controller attached that supports rumble
SwitchPreference.android:title: Rumble Device

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Rumble any controllers attached to your device. Requires Android 12+ and a wired connection normally. Try with the different render engines if you have issues.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Rumble Controller

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose how much of the screen the mini gamepad should use in the xHome/xCloud mode
ListPreference.android:title: Mini Gamepad Size

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose how the video is scaled on your screen
ListPreference.android:title: Video Fit

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Video Vertical Offset
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Slide to offset video from the center of the screen (50=center, 0=top, 100=bottom). Useful for dual-screen devices (only compatible with some 'Video Fit' types)

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable Audio in GameStream and MirrorCast modes
SwitchPreference.android:title: Enable Audio

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose to appear as a windows user (high quality and play 360 games) or an android user (less lag but lower quality)
ListPreference.android:title: Emulate Windows or Android Client

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose the max allowed bitrate. Lower this value on lower performing devices if you consistently see dropped/choppy frames.
ListPreference.android:title: Max Bitrate

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose how frequently to pull data from a connected controller.
ListPreference.android:title: Physical Controller Refresh Rate

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose a location/region to connect to the XCloud servers in. Default will use the closest region available. Useful if XCloud is not available in your area. Does not impact XHome.
ListPreference.android:title: Choose a region for XCloud

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose a language to use while playing xCloud.
ListPreference.android:title: Choose an xCloud Language

Preference.android:summary: Click to create a new button mapping configuration template for a physical controller
Preference.android:title: Create New Layout

ListPreference.android:summary: Click to select what button mapping config to use (created above) when a physical controller is connected.
ListPreference.android:title: Select Controller Layout

ListPreference.android:summary: Configure how the notification tray remote is shown (requires app restart to apply changes)
ListPreference.android:title: Notification Tray Remote

ListPreference.android:summary: Configure how quickly the keyboard feature should move to type keys. Reduce the speed if you consistently get bad key presses.
ListPreference.android:title: Keyboard Type Speed

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Invert the tilt direction on the X axis.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Invert Horizontal Tilt

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Invert the tilt direction on the Y axis.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Invert Vertical Tilt

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Tilt Joystick Deadzone
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Select how big the deadzone should be for the tilt joystick.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Tilt Joystick Sensitivity
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Select how sensitive the tilt joystick should be

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable audio by default while casting console to a smart TV
SwitchPreference.android:title: TV Cast - Enable Audio

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Enable info bar by default while casting console to a smart TV
SwitchPreference.android:title: TV Cast - Enable Info Bar

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose what happens when casting Xbox 360 videos
ListPreference.android:title: Video Convert Prompt

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose the quality of converted Xbox 360 videos. The higher the quality the longer it will take to convert
ListPreference.android:title: Video Convert Quality

ListPreference.android:summary: Choose the size of converted Xbox 360 videos
ListPreference.android:title: Video Convert Size

SwitchPreference.android:summary: Use the legacy theme. Requires app restart.
SwitchPreference.android:title: Use Legacy Theme
